message:
🐛 Fix terminal clipboard: merge duplicate key handlers (#132)

The previous clipboard handler was being overridden by a second
attachCustomKeyEventHandler call (xterm only supports one). Merged
both into a single handler that properly:
- Cmd/Ctrl+V: reads system clipboard and sends text via WebSocket
- Cmd/Ctrl+C: copies selection to clipboard (Ctrl+C still sends
  interrupt when no text is selected on non-Mac)
- Cmd/Ctrl+X: copies selection to clipboard
- Cmd/Ctrl+A: selects all terminal text

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
